summary: Completed testing of ETI Educom website updates. All features verified: Footer certifications (ISO Certified, MSME Registered, Trusted Website), Refer & Earn link in Quick Links and bottom bar, Pathankot branch link in Our Branches, new Refer and Earn page with 3-step process and working form, new Pathankot branch page, updated About page with new heading and removed milestones, updated Franchise page with entrepreneurship focus, removed 'ETI Learning Systems Private Limited' from all pages.
